name: Sourcegraph
tagline: Sourcegraph is a code search and navigation tool (open-source/self-hosted). More information about this container can be found here: https://hub.docker.com/r/
description:
Sourcegraph is a code search and navigation tool (open-source/self-hosted). More information about this container can be found here: https://hub.docker.com/r/


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  sourcegraph:
    image: sourcegraph/server:3.2.2
    volumes:
      - sourcegraph-config:/etc/sourcegraph
      - sourcegraph-data:/var/opt/sourcegraph
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42115:7080
volumes:
  sourcegraph-config: null
  sourcegraph-data: null
